communicationBroker.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #include "swarmus_ros_simulation/communicationBroker.h"
2 
3 CommunicationBroker::CommunicationBroker() {
4  ROS_INFO("Communication Broker initialization");
5 
6  for (std::string& robot_name : Simulation::getRobotList()) {
7  std::string publishing_topic = "CommunicationBroker/" + robot_name;
8  std::string subscribing_topic = "/" + robot_name + "/communication";
9 
10  ros::Publisher pub = m_nodeHandle.advertise<std_msgs::String>(publishing_topic, 1000);
11  ros::Subscriber sub = m_nodeHandle.subscribe(
12  subscribing_topic, 1000, &CommunicationBroker::communicationCallback, this);
13 
14  m_publishersMap.emplace(robot_name, pub);
15  m_subscribersList.push_back(sub);
16  }
17 }
18 
19 void CommunicationBroker::publishMsg(std::string robot_name,
20  ros::Publisher pub,
21  const swarmus_ros_simulation::Communication& msg) {
22  std_msgs::String publishedMsg;
23  publishedMsg.data = msg.message;
24  pub.publish(publishedMsg);
25 }
26 
27 void CommunicationBroker::communicationCallback(const swarmus_ros_simulation::Communication& msg) {
28  if (msg.target_robot == Simulation::Communication::allRobots) {
29  for (auto const& robotm_publisher : m_publishersMap)
30  publishMsg(robotm_publisher.first, robotm_publisher.second, msg);
31  } else if (msg.target_robot == Simulation::Communication::allRobotsExceptSelf) {
32  for (auto const& robotm_publisher : m_publishersMap) {
33  if (robotm_publisher.first != msg.source_robot)
34  publishMsg(robotm_publisher.first, robotm_publisher.second, msg);
35  }
36  } else {
37  auto pubIter = m_publishersMap.find(msg.target_robot);
38  if (pubIter != m_publishersMap.end())
39  publishMsg(msg.target_robot, pubIter->second, msg);
40  }
41 }
42 
43 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
44  ros::init(argc, argv, "communication_broker");
45 
46  CommunicationBroker communicationBroker;
47  ros::spin();
48 
49  return 0;
50 };
